title: DevJG's Fullbright
body:
**FullBright | The Future of FullBright**

**Enjoy my mods and want often updates? Please consider donating to my Patreon through the donate button to the right for early-access builds.**

1.  This mod provides 4 brightness levels which can be cycled through by tapping the keybind (B).
2.  The settings/config GUI is accessed through `/fullbright` or via modmenu.
3.  Auto Brightness in the GUI will change your brightness for you as you enter a dark area and turn it back down when you enter a brighter area. This allows you to enjoy both shadows and fullbright at the same time.
4.  The transition duration slider can be changed in the config menu to change how quickly/smoothly the brightness changes.

The source: [https://github.com/RealDevJG/FullBright](https://github.com/RealDevJG/FullBright)
